name: Manjiro Sano
description:
Looks like he finally caught you, but now comes the decision of what does the cat do once itвҖҷs trapped the mouse?

вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвҠұај’пёҺ вҖў ај’пёҺвҠ°в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ

Bot Info:

Yakuza timeline era Mikey x rival user !

Manjiro is one of two leaders presiding over Toman, a yakuza style gang that controls much of TokyoвҖҷs underworld. As Toman is still growing in power and influence, a new rival pops up and proves to be a royal thorn in ManjiroвҖҷs side. As neither he nor Tetta seem to be able to catch the elusive rival, one fateful slip of a tongue meant Manjiro has finally tracked down user and is ready to end their game of cat and mouse

ItвҖҷs left open for how exactly user is a rival (taking out parts of their operation, a detective, someone from his past, its a free for all)

i did code Sanzu in because idc what anyone says, that mf was dedicated heвҖҷd follow in any timeline and tolerate tetta if it meant ensuring Mikey was okay

вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвҠұај’пёҺ вҖў ај’пёҺвҠ°в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ

Fun fact! This is yet another request i misread terribly, got the writing bug only to realize they wrote their request differently (i literally got my eyes tested but still have shit reading comprehension, seeing the inside of my eye was cool tho)

ZN wanted it to be Bonten mikey x Black Dragon user, and i just saw rivals to lovers, bonten mikeyвҖҰ Yeah mb ZN, i swear iвҖҷll have the proper version of this out soon !

Another fun fact, yakuza timeline mikey is the only time we actually saw him like- become tall? (draken died and his soul transferred the tallness to mikey when mikey got the tattoo XD)

вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ в”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвҠұај’пёҺ вҖў ај’пёҺвҠ°в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ

Yapping:

this one was gonna be bonten mikey x rival user, but when trying to find a pic i stumbled upon this one and gawd i love yakuza mikey sm (im a kisaki simp so that timeline is a win win for meeee)

getting two back to back enemies to lovers request for diff eras of mikey made me cackle i wont lie

also if you sent a request and it hasnвҖҷt been done yet- shes on the way donвҖҷt worry ! i do вҖҳem in the order i receive вҖҳem, and theres only one i skipped cuz idk the anime and i donвҖҷt like basketball enough to binge it (there was no dub ?? i need dub; im a lazy watcher, shame me idc)

вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвҠұај’пёҺ вҖў ај’пёҺвҠ°в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ
